testcase.name: byzantineEquivocatingLeaderStillMakesProgress
testcase.system-out: [UdpTransport] listening on port 5000 [FL] Node 0 up on port 5000 [SL] Node 0 up [PL] Node 0 up [APL] Node 0 up w/ auth stuff [Node 0] up on port 5000 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=EQUIVOCATE_LEADER) [UdpTransport] listening on port 5001 [FL] Node 1 up on port 5001 [SL] Node 1 up [PL] Node 1 up [APL] Node 1 up w/ auth stuff [Node 1] up on port 5001 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [UdpTransport] listening on port 5002 [FL] Node 2 up on port 5002 [SL] Node 2 up [PL] Node 2 up [APL] Node 2 up w/ auth stuff [Node 2] up on port 5002 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [UdpTransport] listening on port 5003 [FL] Node 3 up on port 5003 [SL] Node 3 up [PL] Node 3 up [APL] Node 3 up w/ auth stuff [Node 3] up on port 5003 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [Client 203] up on port 6203 [Client 203] sent req d6673aa4-5729-47a0-870f-5c4c2a8a422c to node 0 [Client 203] sent req d6673aa4-5729-47a0-870f-5c4c2a8a422c to node 1 [Client 203] sent req d6673aa4-5729-47a0-870f-5c4c2a8a422c to node 2 [Client 203] sent req d6673aa4-5729-47a0-870f-5c4c2a8a422c to node 3 [Node 0] now on view 1 (timeout) [Node 1] now on view 1 (received NEW_VIEW) [Node 2] now on view 1 (received NEW_VIEW) [Node 3] now on view 1 (received NEW_VIEW) [Node 1] chain got: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 1] now on view 2 (block decided) [Client 203] got reply frm node 1 (view 1): committed:view=1 [Node 0] chain got: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 2] chain got: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 3] chain got: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 0] now on view 2 (block decided) [Node 3] now on view 2 (block decided) [Node 2] now on view 2 (block decided) [Client 203] got reply frm node 0 (view 1): committed:view=1 [Client 203] stopped [Node 0] stopped [Node 1] stopped [Node 2] stopped [Node 3] stopped

testcase.name: replayAttackIsRejected
testcase.system-out: [Node 2] genesis loaded — ISTCoin at 0x75ec0a2c8d4a09758dfe963c00cad62796835b48 [Node 2] genesis block persisted: 0x8198858048e38e3c7eec5db29aaaea03cb2c41a7a73311c5bbbef7cc2f7551d0 [UdpTransport] listening on port 5002 [FL] Node 2 up on port 5002 [SL] Node 2 up [PL] Node 2 up [APL] Node 2 up w/ auth stuff [Node 2] up on port 5002 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [Node 2] got data from node 1: first [Node 2] stopped

testcase.name: clientRequiresDistinctSignedReplies
testcase.system-out: [Client 206] up on port 6206 [Client 206] got reply frm node 0 (view 7): ok-from-0 [Client 206] got reply frm node 0 (view 7): duplicate-from-0 [Client 206] got reply frm node 1 (view 7): ok-from-1 [Client 206] stopped

testcase.name: invalidVoteSignatureByzantineNodeDoesNotBreakConsensus

testcase.name: consensusAppendsToAllNodes
